scripts.smoke:api: rm -rf data/playwright-smoke && mkdir -p data/playwright-smoke && WRITER_ASSISTANCE_DATABASE_URL="sqlite+pysqlite:///$PWD/data/playwright-smoke/app.db" WRITER_ASSISTANCE_STORAGE_ROOT="$PWD/data/playwright-smoke/storage" WRITER_ASSISTANCE_AI_MODE=smoke uv run --project apps/api uvicorn writer_assistance_api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
